title: canary factories
manager: Weighted canary cohorts — `via factory weighted [v1 90% v2 10%]` — so a new version rolls out to a small fraction of a population first, with cohort drift comparison to catch a regression before it is everywhere. This is progressive delivery for machine fleets, falling out of the factory + population + migration machinery: canary the risky version, compare the cohorts on live behavior, then promote or roll back.
cs: `via factory weighted [v1 90% v2 10%]` + cohort drift comparison; progressive rollout over populations (W7.17); builds on migration (W9.3).
